name: Orange-Glazed Ham
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the ham into 3/4-inch chunks.
2. Cut the celery on a slant (bias) into 1/2-inch chunks.
3. Mix together the cornstarch and ground ginger in a small bowl.
4. Toss the sliced ham, chopped celery, and orange sections with the cornstarch mixture until well coated.
5. Place the glazed ham in an oven-safe dish.
6. Bake at 375°F (190°C) for 20-25 minutes or until heated through and lightly browned.
Note: If the Mandarin Orange Sections do not contain pineapple, you can add a small amount of pineapple juice to the cornstarch mixture to enhance the flavor.
